meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with this expert client workflow. A beginner-level checklist utilizing Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop manual configuration and repetitive boilerplate. By integrating Antigravity for automated infrastructure scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative feature implementation, freelancers can reduce development overhead by 70%. This workflow forces a modular architecture, ensuring your code remains clean, scalable, and ready for client hand-off in record time.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'Freelancer’s Paradox': the more code you write, the slower you seem to move. Every new client project starts with the same soul-crushing setup, dependency hell, and deployment anxiety that eats into your margins and kills your momentum. You aren't just a coder; you are a business owner, and your time is the most expensive asset you own.

It’s time to stop artisan-crafting every line of boilerplate and start building like a factory. By layering Antigravity’s rapid infrastructure orchestration with the precise intelligence of Claude Code, you can transform your development process from a manual slog into a high-velocity engine. Let’s strip away the friction and ship at the speed of thought.

steps.title: Standardize the Tech Stack
steps.description: Define a repeatable base architecture so you never waste time on setup again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and Supabase integration. Include a clean folder structure for modular components.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scoping
steps.description: Use AI to turn vague client requirements into actionable technical tasks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following client requirements [Insert Requirements] and generate a JSON task list for a 3-sprint development roadmap.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review requirements.md and create a task_list.json file for implementation.'

steps.title: Rapid Component Generation
steps.description: Build UI components iteratively without getting bogged down in CSS boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive pricing table component using Shadcn UI that includes a toggle for monthly and annual billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a PricingTable component in /components/ui/ that matches our design tokens.'

steps.title: Streamline API Integrations
steps.description: Handle external service connections through standardized middleware.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust API handler for Stripe webhooks that includes error logging and database sync.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the stripe-webhook-handler.ts file with robust error handling and TypeScript types.'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Ensure your code is production-ready before the client even sees a demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the authentication middleware and the user profile update function.

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context File' (.context) to feed Claude Code your project's specific style guide and architectural constraints.
Automate your git commits with a custom script that summarizes changes based on the Claude Code diff output.
Never start a new feature without a 'Plan' command; force the AI to outline the logic before writing a single line of code.
Use Antigravity to create 'Golden Path' templates that you can reuse across different clients to maximize billable hours.
Keep your terminal output clean by piping Claude Code logs into a dedicated folder, ensuring you can audit AI decisions later.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully deployed your first project using this workflow, audit your time logs to calculate your new 'Code-per-Hour' metric and optimize your templates accordingly.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your hours for slow, manual labor. Master the tools that allow you to ship enterprise-grade software in a fraction of the time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
